task_objective: Move the 'Loading' status message to underneath the dropdown and update its text and formatting.
design_decisions: Moved the initial 'Loading' message into the 'Status:' row for better visual integration.
Updated the loading text to 'Loading game list...' and applied bold blue formatting (#60a5fa).
Removed the redundant loading message at the bottom of the Sync section to avoid clutter.
results: The loading UI is now more integrated and visually consistent with the rest of the plugin's status display.
